title: latash #3913
definition:
1) to sharpen, hammer, whet
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to hammer
        1a2) to sharpen (sword)
        1a3) hammerer (participle)
    1b) (Pual) to be sharpened
nasbUsage:
